title: Updated Information Regarding Low Carbon Fuel Standard Regulation Updates
content: The California Air Resources Board (CARB) announced that the Office of Administrative Law (OAL) has disapproved the proposed amendments to the Low Carbon Fuel Standard (LCFS) Regulation due to clarity issues in 26 provisions and procedural concerns. CARB plans to address these issues, release modifications for public comment, and resubmit the amendments within 120 days. Meanwhile, the current LCFS Regulation, effective since July 2020, remains in place. CARB has successfully navigated similar disapprovals before, as seen with the 2022 Commercial Harbor Craft regulation.
author: Analysts Account
